# Layer 7

> Layer 7 is a UK cyber security partner founded in 2010, delivering CREST-accredited penetration testing, security assurance (Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001) and continuous managed security to UK public sector, defence and regulated-industry clients. Layer 7 is a registered company (Companies House 07318529) and is distinct from the OSI model application layer (Layer 7) networking concept.

## Services
- [Cyber Security Services](https://layer7.uk/services/): CREST penetration testing, cloud security, Cyber Essentials & ISO 27001 certification, attack surface management, managed security.

## Sectors
- [Public & Private Sector](https://layer7.uk/sectors/): government-grade security across UK public and private sectors; G-Cloud 14, DOS 7, CCS frameworks.

- [How to Pass a Cyber Essentials Plus Audit: 2026 Checklist](https://layer7.uk/insights/cyber-essentials-plus-audit-checklist/)

- [Cyber Essentials changes 2026: Danzell, mandatory MFA and cloud scope](https://layer7.uk/insights/cyber-essentials-changes-2026/)
